title: iva axillaris var. parvifolia
intro: Iva axillaris var. parvifolia, also known as small-leaved marsh elder, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Iva axillaris var. parvifolia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
